overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through a grassy urban plaza surrounded by modern glass and concrete skyscrapers on a clear day. The camera follows steadily from behind as she moves between tall buildings with reflective facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy urban plaza between corporate skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the grassy plaza between tall modern buildings, approaching a curved glass skyscraper

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with horizontal window strips running along the left side of the path
tall curved skyscraper with reflective blue glass facade showing cloud reflections, dominating the right side of the view
modern office tower with grid-patterned windows adjacent to the curved glass building
tan-colored office building visible in the background between the foreground structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an empty grassy plaza enclosed by modern skyscrapers. A concrete office building recedes on the left while a prominent curved glass skyscraper with cloud reflections grows larger on the right. The scene is brightly lit with clear skies visible between the tall structures, and no other pedestrians or vehicles are present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban plaza that emphasizes the towering scale of surrounding modern architecture. It begins with the character walking across an empty expanse of grass, as a concrete office building recedes into the distance on the left. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward the right, where a prominent curved glass skyscraper grows larger and more dominant in the frame. The scene concludes with the reflective facade of the tower filling the view, mirroring the clear blue sky and drifting clouds above the silent city center.
